title: Add Tsishingini (tsw) language metadata and layout scripts
description: Added ISO metadata and generator script entries for the Tsishingini language layout to resolve language setup issues in Wikipedia's language tools.
review_notes: Always run generator script before adding language data.
Check that language subtag meets ISO standards.

title: Fix memory leak in Wikimedia Commons image uploader
description: Resolved a memory leak caused by unremoved event listeners in the upload wizard's image cropping tool.
review_notes: Clean up listeners in componentWillUnmount or useEffect cleanup return.
Verify changes with leak-detecting unit tests.

title: Migrate Gerrit patch verification flow to GitHub Actions runner
description: Moved translation-server patch checking from legacy Jenkins server to a self-hosted GitHub Actions runner setup for Wikidata integration.
review_notes: Ensure environment secrets are properly sandboxed on runner.

title: Create Phabricator task for tracking RoadToWiki progression dashboard
description: Detailed task mapping GKM's community roadmap and dashboard integration goals for Wikimedia community visibility.

title: Draft article content for newly discovered historical sites in Bihar
description: Created comprehensive reference and outline details on Wikipedia regarding historical ruins in Bihar.
